text:
ハッハハハハッ！　最高だＺＥ！
二人とも、想像以上のアクターだ！
こいつはいいフィルムになりそうだ！

/ci1 1 ちょっ、冗談でしょ！
Ｔ・レックスとか……そういうのは
図鑑と映画の中だけにしなさいよ！

HAAHAHAHA! Fantastic! You two are even
better actors than I gave you credit for!
This is gonna be a cinematic masterpiece!

/ci1 1 Tch, this is nuts! T-Rexes and the like
should have the good grace to stay in
encyclopedias and movies where they belong!
